# Zonely — Find & Hire Verified Local Experts

Zonely is a US marketplace connecting clients with verified local professionals including lawyers, CPAs, plumbers, notaries, electricians, and more.

## What Zonely Does
- Clients find and contact verified local professionals by category and city
- Professionals list their services and receive qualified leads
- Pay-per-lead model: professionals only pay when they receive a verified inquiry

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.zonelyleads.com
- Browse Professionals: https://www.zonelyleads.com/all-service
- Professional Profiles: https://www.zonelyleads.com/service/{slug}
- Categories: https://www.zonelyleads.com/category/{slug}
- Blog: https://www.zonelyleads.com/blog
- Sitemap: https://www.zonelyleads.com/sitemap.xml

## Coverage
- United States only
- Categories: Professional Services, Healthcare & Wellness, Home Services & Repairs, Beauty & Personal Care, Legal, Financial, and more

## Data & Content
- All professional profiles contain: name, title, bio, location, services, reviews, experience, education, certifications
- JSON-LD structured data (LocalBusiness, AggregateRating) present on all professional profile pages
- Reviews are verified client submissions

## Contact
- Website: https://www.zonelyleads.com
- Help: https://www.zonelyleads.com/help
- About: https://www.zonelyleads.com/about-us
